_comment: Add or override LLM providers here without editing any Python. Each entry is an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. After editing, restart Anchors Aweigh. Keys: label (shown in dropdown), base_url (must end in /v1 or equivalent), model, needs_key (true shows an API-key box), min_interval (seconds between calls; raise it for rate-limited bridges, 0 for local), note (shown under the dropdown).

lmstudio.label: LM Studio (free, local)
lmstudio.note: Free & local. Start LM Studio's local server and load a model first.

openrouter.label: OpenRouter (many models, key)
openrouter.note: One key, hundreds of models (some free). Set the model to any OpenRouter model id.
